# ⚠ This repo is generated — do not edit it

The source of truth for these files is:

### rulingAnts/flextext-editor → `satellites/text-recorder/`

Anything committed directly here is **overwritten** the next time the
`Publish satellites` workflow runs. Make changes in `flextext-editor` instead.

This repo exists only because GitHub Pages serves a project site at `/<repo-name>/`, and this app
must live at a path disjoint from `/flextext-editor/` — two PWAs sharing a scope are treated by
the browser as a single installed app.
